trait.confidence_notes: No genome-wide significant chrX loci in current build. GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit.
trait.category: UK Biobank Assessment Centre > Touchscreen > Lifestyle and environment > Diet
trait.description_more: ACE touchscreen question "How often do you eat oily fish? (e.g. sardines, salmon, mackerel, herring)" If the participant activated the Help button they were shown the message:     Please provide an average considering your intake over the last year. If you are unsure, please provide an estimate or select Do not know. Oily fish include:   Salmon  Anchovies   Trout   Swordfish   Mackerel  Bloater   Herring  Cacha   Sardines  Carp   Pilchards  Hilsa   Kipper   Jack fish   Eel   Katla   Whitebait  Orange roughy   Tuna (fresh only) Pangas   Sprats
